Metadata.title: Flow Inc. - AI-Native Solutions for Business Transformation
Metadata.description: Leading AI-Native startup providing cutting-edge AI development, training, and consulting services to transform businesses through intelligent automation and optimization.

Hero.heading: Build AI products,
Hero.headingHighlight: train teams, ship our own tools.
Hero.subtitle: Flow Inc. is a small global team that builds AI products end-to-end — for founders, enterprises, and ourselves.

Services.heading: Three ways we work with you
Services.description: Whether you need a product built, a team trained, or want to use what we've built ourselves — there's a clear way in.

dev.title: AI Development
dev.description: End-to-end AI product development. We integrate generative AI into web and mobile apps, build voice agents, and ship custom ML models — with predictable scope and pricing.

training.title: AI Training & Consulting
training.description: Help your team adopt AI in their daily work. We coach engineers on Claude Code and AI-driven coding, implement internal AI tools, and run executive sessions on AI strategy.

products.title: Own Products
products.description: We build and operate our own AI products. They're how we stay sharp, validate ideas, and pressure-test what we recommend to clients.

Expertise.heading: Cutting-Edge Technologies We Master
Expertise.description: Our team stays at the forefront of technology, working with the latest tools and frameworks to deliver state-of-the-art AI solutions.

Team.heading: A small core, a global network
Team.description: Flow operates as a tight founding team plus a curated network of specialists we've worked with for 10+ years. We assemble the right team per project, on-demand.

masa.bio: 10+ years building consumer products end-to-end as engineer, PM, and board director at a growth-stage startup. Brings that operating experience to AI product development — from problem framing to shipped MVP.

network.bio: Specialists assembled per project — senior ML/AI engineers, native mobile experts across Asia, full-stack engineers from European fintech, and seasoned product designers, all trusted collaborators of 10+ years.

Contact.heading: Ready to Transform Your Business?
Contact.description: Let's discuss how Flow Inc. can help you harness the power of AI to drive innovation and growth in your organization.
Contact.conversationDescription: Whether you're looking to implement AI solutions, train your team, or transform your business processes, we're here to help.
Contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project and how we can help...
Contact.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

SecurityPolicy.title: Information Security Policy
SecurityPolicy.intro: Flow Inc. (hereinafter referred to as "the Company") establishes and implements the following Information Security Policy (hereinafter referred to as "this Policy") to protect its information assets from all threats and to meet the trust and expectations of its customers and all related parties.

section1.title: Purpose
section1.body: The purpose of this Policy is to maintain the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of the information assets handled in the Company's business activities, and to prevent information security incidents.

section2.title: Scope
section2.body: This Policy applies to all directors and employees of the Company, all related parties including subcontractors engaged in the Company's business, and all information assets handled by the Company.

section3.title: Basic Commitments
section3.body: The Company will implement the following commitments to ensure information security.
items: Comply with laws, governmental guidelines, and other standards related to information security.
Implement necessary safety management measures to appropriately protect information assets from risks such as unauthorized access, loss, destruction, falsification, and leakage.
Regularly review and evaluate the implementation status of information security measures, and continuously improve them.
Conduct education and awareness activities related to information security to raise the information security awareness of directors and employees.
In the event of an information security incident, promptly investigate the cause, minimize damage, and work to prevent recurrence.

section4.title: Implementation Structure
section4.body: The Representative Director serves as the Information Security Manager and is responsible for the appropriate management of information assets and the implementation of this Policy.

section5.title: Obligations of Employees
section5.body: All directors and employees shall comply with this Policy and related regulations and procedures, and endeavor to handle information assets appropriately.

section6.title: Management of Subcontractors
section6.body: When outsourcing business operations, the Company shall verify the information security level of subcontractors and, as necessary, clarify information security obligations through contracts.

section7.title: Continuous Improvement
section7.body: The Company shall periodically review and continuously improve this Policy in response to changes in the information security environment, business content, and information security risks.
